_comment: Valid JSON example for VLA-Lab deploy. Keys starting with _comment are ignored by the current loader, so you can keep or remove them.
_comment_recommendation: Prefer explicit SSH fields below instead of relying on ~/.ssh/config on the machine that runs the dashboard.

server._comment: Model server machine. ssh_host can be an alias, hostname, or IP.
server.label: Model Server
server._comment_ssh_options: Each item becomes one `ssh -o ...` flag. Useful for bastion, host key policy, etc.

model_server_config_path._comment: This path is interpreted on the remote `server` machine, not on the dashboard machine.
model_server_config_path.label: Model Server Config Path

inference_client_config_path._comment: This path is interpreted on the remote `client` machine.
inference_client_config_path.label: Inference Client Config Path

start_robot_server._comment: Background commands should always provide both stdout_log and stderr_log.
start_robot_server.label: 启动机器人服务
start_robot_server.template: source /opt/miniconda3/etc/profile.d/conda.sh && conda activate robot && python control/start_server.py

set_joint_preset._comment: Foreground command. No log path needed because output is returned directly.
set_joint_preset.label: 设置关节位姿
set_joint_preset.template: source /opt/miniconda3/etc/profile.d/conda.sh && conda activate robot && python control/set_joint_positions.py

start_inference_client.label: 启动推理客户端
start_inference_client.template: source /opt/miniconda3/etc/profile.d/conda.sh && conda activate robot && python inference_client.py --config {inference_client_config_path}
